programme.title: Freaky
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Millie Kessler spends her days trying to survive high school and the cruel actions of the popular crowd. But when she becomes the latest target of the Butcher, the town's infamous serial killer, her senior year becomes the least of her worries. When the Butcher's mystical dagger causes him and Millie to magically switch bodies, the frightened teen learns she has just 24 hours to

programme.title: Come Play
programme.desc: A monster named Larry manifests itself through smartphones and mobile devices. Feature film version of the 2017 short film.

programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Come Play
programme.desc: A monster named Larry manifests itself through smartphones and mobile devices. Feature film version of the 2017 short film.

programme.title: Men in Black 2
programme.desc: Kay and Jay reunite to provide our best line of defense against a seductress who levels the toughest challenge yet to the MIB's mission statement: protecting the earth from the scum of the universe. While investigating a routine crime, Jay uncovers a plot masterminded by Serleena, a Kylothian monster who disguises herself as a lingerie model. When Serleena takes the MIB building hostage, there is

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Even though agents J and K have been protecting the Earth from alien scum for many years, J still does not know much about his gruff partner. However, J soon gets an unexpected chance to find out what makes K tick when an alien criminal called Boris the Animal escapes, goes back to 1969, and kills K. With the fate of the planet at stake, J goes back in time and teams up with K's younger self to pu

programme.title: Freaky
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Millie Kessler spends her days trying to survive high school and the cruel actions of the popular crowd. But when she becomes the latest target of the Butcher, the town's infamous serial killer, her senior year becomes the least of her worries. When the Butcher's mystical dagger causes him and Millie to magically switch bodies, the frightened teen learns she has just 24 hours to

programme.title: Willow
programme.desc: Enter the world of "Willow." Journey to the far corners of your imagination, to a land of myth and magic, where dream and reality live side by side ... to a place that never existed, a time that never was. It is a world where a young man named Willow lives out an adventure that explodes beyond the boundaries of his own hopes and fears.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: When timid bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss (Jim Carrey) discovers a magical mask containing the spirit of the Norse god Loki, his entire life changes. While wearing the mask, Ipkiss becomes a supernatural playboy exuding charm and confidence which allows him to catch the eye of local nightclub singer Tina Carlyle (Cameron Diaz). Unfortunately, under the mask's influence, Ipkiss also robs a bank, which a

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-ma

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: At a carnival, young Josh Baskin wishes he were big, only to wake up the next morning and discover his wish came true. But the more Josh experiences life as an adult, the more he longs for the simple joys of childhood.

programme.title: Willow
programme.desc: Enter the world of "Willow." Journey to the far corners of your imagination, to a land of myth and magic, where dream and reality live side by side ... to a place that never existed, a time that never was. It is a world where a young man named Willow lives out an adventure that explodes beyond the boundaries of his own hopes and fears.

programme.title: The Ark
programme.desc: An unexpected visitor wreaks havoc on the ship's electrical system.

programme.title: The Ark
programme.desc: Two theories on what could and shouldn't have been are revealed when two realities intertwine.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-ma

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: At a carnival, young Josh Baskin wishes he were big, only to wake up the next morning and discover his wish came true. But the more Josh experiences life as an adult, the more he longs for the simple joys of childhood.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A magical board game unleashes a world of adventure on siblings Peter and Judy Shepherd. While exploring an old mansion, the youngsters find a curious, jungle-themed game called Jumanji in the attic. When they start playing, they free Alan Parrish, who's been stuck in the game's inner world for decades. If they win Jumanji, the kids can free Alan for good, but that means braving giant bugs, ill-ma

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: When timid bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss (Jim Carrey) discovers a magical mask containing the spirit of the Norse god Loki, his entire life changes. While wearing the mask, Ipkiss becomes a supernatural playboy exuding charm and confidence which allows him to catch the eye of local nightclub singer Tina Carlyle (Cameron Diaz). Unfortunately, under the mask's influence, Ipkiss also robs a bank, which a

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: In a Mexico City wracked by a recent wave of kidnappings, ex-CIA operative John Creasy (Denzel Washington) reluctantly accepts a job as a bodyguard for 9-year-old Lupita (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of wealthy businessman Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony). Just as Creasy begins to develop a fondness for the young girl, a bloodthirsty gunman (Jesús Ochoa) kidnaps her. Now, Creasy must pick off a succes

programme.title: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, highly intelligent robots fill public service positions throughout the world, operating under three rules to keep humans safe. Despite his dark history with robotics, Detective Del Spooner (Will Smith) investigates the alleged suicide of U.S. Robotics founder Alfred Lanning (James Cromwell) and believes that a human-like robot (Alan Tudyk) murdered him. With the help of a robot expert (Br

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. When the daring duo come across a beautiful scientist (Penélope Cruz) who is juggling an escape from a warlord and a mission to stop the spread

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: A New York reporter heads to Australia to interview the living legend Mike Dundee (Paul Hogan). When she finally locates him, she is so taken with him that she brings him back with her to New York. In New York, Mike Dundee is amazed by the wonders of the city and the interesting people there.

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II
programme.desc: Mick "Crocodile" Dundee (Paul Hogan) is settling into his new Manhattan home when a South American drug dealer (Hechter Ubarry) abducts his girlfriend, Sue Charlton (Linda Kozlowski). The drug dealer thinks images of his criminal activities, taken by Sue's photographer ex-husband, are now in her hands. The dealer takes Sue to Colombia and threatens her, hoping that she'll give up the evidence. But

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: When prostitute Delilah Fitzgerald (Anna Thomson) is disfigured by a pair of cowboys in Big Whiskey, Wyoming, her fellow brothel workers post a reward for their murder, much to the displeasure of sheriff Little Bill Daggett (Gene Hackman), who doesn't allow vigilantism in his town. Two groups of gunfighters, one led by aging former bandit William Munny (Clint Eastwood), the other by the florid Eng

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: After making a speech in Moscow vowing to never negotiate with terrorists, President James Marshall boards Air Force One with his family and advisers. When a group of terrorists led by Ivan Korshunov hijacks the flight, the President's principles are put to the test. Feigning escape, ex-solider Marshall stows away in the aircraft and must race against time to rescue his family and everyone else on

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In April 2009, the U.S. container ship Maersk Alabama sails toward its destination on a day that seems like any other. Suddenly, Somali pirates race toward the vessel, climb aboard and take everyone hostage. The captain of the ship, Richard Phillips, looks to protect his crew from the hostile invaders, and their leader, Muse. The pirates are after millions of dollars, and Phillips must use his wit

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Captain John Miller (Tom Hanks) takes his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Surrounded by the brutal realties of war, while searching for Ryan, each man embarks upon a personal journey and discovers their own strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honor, decency and courage.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both t

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Lt. Daniel Kaffee (Tom Cruise) is a military lawyer defending two U.S. Marines charged with killing a fellow Marine at the Guantánamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba. Although Kaffee is known for seeking plea bargains, a fellow lawyer, Lt. Cdr. JoAnne Galloway (Demi Moore), convinces him that the accused marines were most likely carrying out an order from a commanding officer. Kaffee takes a risk by callin

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both t

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A magazine votes Harry (Harry Anderson) one of New York's 10 most interesting men. With Markie Post and John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Christine's (Markie Post) ex-husband Tony (Ray Abruzzo) disrupts her blossoming romance with Harry (Harry Anderson). With John Larroquette.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Harry is arrested after spying on Christine and Tony in the park; Dan is swindled out of his "Phil's Foundation" funds.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: The replacement (Gilbert Gottfried) for Dan (John Larroquette) is even more objectionable; Harry and Christine (Harry Anderson, Markie Post) face breaking up.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan, costumed as the "Phantom of the Courthouse," hides out in the subterranean levels of the building.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: Dan (John Larroquette) is humiliated by appearing in dog court when he returns to work. With Harry Anderson.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: In April 2009, the U.S. container ship Maersk Alabama sails toward its destination on a day that seems like any other. Suddenly, Somali pirates race toward the vessel, climb aboard and take everyone hostage. The captain of the ship, Richard Phillips, looks to protect his crew from the hostile invaders, and their leader, Muse. The pirates are after millions of dollars, and Phillips must use his wit

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Captain John Miller (Tom Hanks) takes his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Surrounded by the brutal realties of war, while searching for Ryan, each man embarks upon a personal journey and discovers their own strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honor, decency and courage.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Lt. Daniel Kaffee (Tom Cruise) is a military lawyer defending two U.S. Marines charged with killing a fellow Marine at the Guantánamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba. Although Kaffee is known for seeking plea bargains, a fellow lawyer, Lt. Cdr. JoAnne Galloway (Demi Moore), convinces him that the accused marines were most likely carrying out an order from a commanding officer. Kaffee takes a risk by callin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works to collect all the evidence they can in an effort to stop Ari.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ari continues to wreak havoc on the team until Gibbs gets the face-off he has been awaiting.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a dead staff sergeant is found encased in a Civil War-era tomb, a cell-phone within it leads investigators to a safe deposit box.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Members of the NCIS squad investigate when a petty officer with a double life is gunned down on a freeway.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Pao is upset that Russ hasn't done his therapy homework; Patrick reveals new information about Thais' trip to Brazil; sumit confesses why he and Jenny can't move out; Shekinah interrupts Rebecca, which sparks a huge fight between Rebecca and Zied.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: After surprising Baylen with a wedding day change, the couple goes to their menu tasting and Colin drops another bombshell; Julie worries the mounting pressure on Sammi to pull off the perfect celebration could further strain her relationship with Baylen.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: Baylen's bridal shower finally arrives, but the celebration takes a turn when she reveals shocking future plans; later, Baylen and Sammi confront the tension that's been lingering; Baylen and Colin's trip to Myrtle might be over before it begins.

programme.title: Doubling Down with the Derricos
programme.desc: Karen and Deon remain at odds over Darian's college decision; when the boys take step class, they try to impress some girls with their moves; GG tells the children about her decision to stop chemotherapy.

programme.title: Doubling Down with the Derricos
programme.desc: For Valentine's Day, the Derricos teach the children about dating; Dior's toothache triggers a trip to the dentist for all the children; when Deon hides the issues in the new house from Karen, it escalates their tension.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: Sammi's planned surprises lead to Baylen and Julie making some permanent decisions and spending an evening at a funeral home; Baylen reveals a worrisome medical concern; then, strong opinions during wedding planning put the sisters at odds again.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: Baylen returns from Kansas City still hurt by Sammi's Bridezilla comment; hoping to lift Baylen's spirits, Colin plans a Valentine's Day surprise while the couple meets a wedding officiant; Colin reveals another surprise she never saw coming.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: After surprising Baylen with a wedding day change, the couple goes to their menu tasting and Colin drops another bombshell; Julie worries the mounting pressure on Sammi to pull off the perfect celebration could further strain her relationship with Baylen.

programme.title: Baylen Out Loud
programme.desc: Baylen's bridal shower finally arrives, but the celebration takes a turn when she reveals shocking future plans; later, Baylen and Sammi confront the tension that's been lingering; Baylen and Colin's trip to Myrtle might be over before it begins.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Krista's roaring 20s birthday bash brings glamour, jealousy, and surprise guests as Sammy and Steph's messy love triangle creates new suspicions; JJ confronts her past, and Krista takes a big climb toward independence.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Krista's birthday party sparks drama as Sammy distances himself from Steph after their kiss; Anthony pursues Krista, while JJ and John grow closer; after a night of Drag Bingo, John shares a shocking secret that leaves JJ stunned.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Steph and John come clean about the secret relationships complicating their lives; Steph's Greek-themed celebration spirals into chaos when Krista confronts Sammy about the messy love triangle threatening to tear the group apart.

programme.title: Jay & Pamela
programme.desc: Jay and Pamela brave New York City to make their runway debut during fashion week; they also want to take in all that NYC has to offer, but sightseeing has its challenges; Raphael and Rene are overwhelmed helping Jay and Pamela shop for a new bed.

programme.title: Jay & Pamela
programme.desc: With Jay turning 30, Pamela plans to celebrate this milestone birthday by giving him the party he always dreamt of as a child. And she has some surprises for him including one that makes him blush!

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Steven and Olga navigate their new lives apart; Caesar travels across the country to meet his new love interest face-to-face; Anna reaches her breaking point as she questions Mursel's lack of intimacy.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Cortney and her fiancé have a major disagreement while wedding planning; Tyray goes to drastic lengths to improve his appearance; Armando faces high stakes as he tries for his U.S. visa again.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Ed makes a daring move towards a new romance; Kim searches for answers about her long-distance romance; Elise uncovers troubling information that could change everything with Josh; Gabe must confront the difficult next stage in his split from Isabel.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Marissa grapples with doubts; Mido is unsure about staying in the U.S.; Rasit bickers with Brandon at his first baseball game; Maxwell's family is shocked to learn Ashia's age; Annabelle is upset at Shea's drunken flirting; Catie meets up with Ryan.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Marissa grapples with doubts; Mido is unsure about staying in the U.S.; Rasit bickers with Brandon at his first baseball game; Maxwell's family is shocked to learn Ashia's age; Annabelle is upset at Shea's drunken flirting; Catie meets up with Ryan.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Edward struggles to fit in with Marissa's friends; Catie's mom is concerned about her recent behavior; Debby asks Mido for a decision; Anabelle offends Shea's daughter; Ashia seeks her mother-in-law's approval; Rasit makes an unlikely bond.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Elizabeth drops a shocking ultimatum when Andrei refuses to expand their family; Chloe is pushed to grow up fast with her mother moving away; Ashley and Manuel's explosive fights push their marriage to the breaking point.

programme.title: Jay & Pamela
programme.desc: Pamela braces for family drama when she and Jay head to Kansas City for her grandmother's funeral; Rene and Raphael are caught completely off guard when Jay and Pamela reveal plans for the future; a visit to a fertility clinic has Pamela on edge.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé
programme.desc: Edward struggles to fit in with Marissa's friends; Catie's mom is concerned about her recent behavior; Debby asks Mido for a decision; Anabelle offends Shea's daughter; Ashia seeks her mother-in-law's approval; Rasit makes an unlikely bond.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Elizabeth drops a shocking ultimatum when Andrei refuses to expand their family; Chloe is pushed to grow up fast with her mother moving away; Ashley and Manuel's explosive fights push their marriage to the breaking point.

programme.title: Jay & Pamela
programme.desc: Pamela braces for family drama when she and Jay head to Kansas City for her grandmother's funeral; Rene and Raphael are caught completely off guard when Jay and Pamela reveal plans for the future; a visit to a fertility clinic has Pamela on edge.

programme.title: Doubling Down with the Derricos
programme.desc: The Derricos head to the mountains to prove that black people ski too; determined to enjoy the vacation, GG hides her latest health symptoms from Deon, but fun on the slopes is cut short by a medical emergency.

programme.title: Doubling Down with the Derricos
programme.desc: The family deals with Karen's medical emergency; GG must come clean about her latest symptoms; the boys want to have their first ever hang out with girls they're crushing on at a skating rink.

programme.title: The Jennifer Hudson Show
programme.desc: Jennifer welcomes back Aldis Hodge to talk about the new season of his show "Cross"; Jack Koltes, 15, is an autistic singer who has received more than 130 million views on social media in less than four months; his dad, Eric, accompanies him on guitar and says performing has helped Jack evolve, gain confidence, and form close friendships.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When Gloria's mother and sister visit, they bring traditions, baby names and family baggage; Phil helps the kids with their problems; Mitchell and Cameron try to correct Lily's bad habits.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When the lead in the school's production of "Phantom of the Opera" gets sick, Manny is willing to do anything to land the lead; Phil and Jay wind up in a golf-off with Mitch and Pepper; Gloria and Alex visit a psychic.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil's Valentine's Day romp ends with Claire in the hospital; Jay and Gloria's attempts at romance are interrupted by the kids; after hosting a wild party, Cam and Mitch are left with hangovers and a new housemate.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Things get awkward when Phil shows up at Claire's college reunion; Jay is fixated on winning a big bowling tournament; a wig malfunction during an elaborate photo shoot with Joe leads to unfortunate results.

programme.title: Four Weddings
programme.desc: Kate has an eco-friendly party; Jennifer has chocolate handcuff favors; Erika's guests hop to a German polka; Roula's guests circle for traditional Greek dancing.

programme.title: Four Weddings
programme.desc: Solimar's bridesmaids choose their own rainbow-hued dresses; Kim's party is assigned all black; Melissa makes her entrance on a yacht; Sheneka impresses with Hollywood impersonators.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Steven and Olga navigate their new lives apart; Caesar travels across the country to meet his new love interest face-to-face; Anna reaches her breaking point as she questions Mursel's lack of intimacy.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Cortney and her fiancé have a major disagreement while wedding planning; Tyray goes to drastic lengths to improve his appearance; Armando faces high stakes as he tries for his U.S. visa again.

programme.title: 90 Day Diaries
programme.desc: Ed makes a daring move towards a new romance; Kim searches for answers about her long-distance romance; Elise uncovers troubling information that could change everything with Josh; Gabe must confront the difficult next stage in his split from Isabel.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: John uncovers the truth about Steph and Sammy's history, but Sammy's flirting with Krista pushes tensions to the edge; when Steph invites Krista's potential love interest Anthony into the mix, jealousy erupts, ending in a blowout fight.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Krista's roaring 20s birthday bash brings glamour, jealousy, and surprise guests as Sammy and Steph's messy love triangle creates new suspicions; JJ confronts her past, and Krista takes a big climb toward independence.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Krista's birthday party sparks drama as Sammy distances himself from Steph after their kiss; Anthony pursues Krista, while JJ and John grow closer; after a night of Drag Bingo, John shares a shocking secret that leaves JJ stunned.

programme.title: Little Singles
programme.desc: Steph and John come clean about the secret relationships complicating their lives; Steph's Greek-themed celebration spirals into chaos when Krista confronts Sammy about the messy love triangle threatening to tear the group apart.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Sarper braces himself for never-before-seen footage of his confrontation outside the bar; Kara explains her secret hallway conversation with Guillermo; the cast deliberates over who they would eat to survive in the wilderness.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Thais becomes emotional while watching never-before-seen footage of her camp therapy session with Patrick and Dr. Tyrone, while Zied doubles down on wanting Rebecca to be a real wife; inspired by Russ and Pao, the cast plays Mouth Mayhem.

programme.title: 90 Day: The Last Resort
programme.desc: Tension amongst the couples reaches new heights at wilderness therapy. Guillermo draws a line in the sand with Kara. Pao is tired of waiting for Russ to be the man she wants. Shekinah and Sarper get exiled from the group.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: After an explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong kills two customs agents investigating currency smuggling, Inspector Lee (Jackie Chan) and James Carter (Chris Tucker) search for the mastermind. Ricky Tan (John Lone), head of the Fu-Cang-Long Triad, sends out his minions to insure that Carter and Lee don't solve the case.

programme.title: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: East meets West when the assassination of Ambassador Han leads to the reunion of Lee and Carter. In Paris, the pair must stay one step ahead of Chinese gangsters and Lee's childhood friend, as they track down an envelope containing the identity of a powerful crime lord.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team searches for an abducted college coed; Jubal has a tense encounter with Rina's mother.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie goes undercover working in a bar to investigate an anti-government group that regularly gathers there; a single father on the periphery of the group begins to fear he's in danger of becoming collateral damage.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a wealthy accountant is gunned down for secretly testifying against a notorious drug lord, the team's investigation leads Tiffany to ask for help from a friend who was formerly with the NYPD and is related to the dangerous crime boss.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: As the team works to rescue a 5-year-old kidnapping victim, Scola suspects the boy's mother isn't being forthcoming about why her son was targeted; Nina struggles to open up to Scola about matters in their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie returns from medical leave and helps the team investigate two homicides: a law student and a young man with possible gang ties; an inadvertent revelation from Maggie causes OA to worry that she is rushing back into the job too quickly.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a deadly truck heist arms the killers with enough ammonium nitrate to construct a massive bomb, the team discovers a link to a terrorist group Maggie is working to infiltrate.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A teen shows up at FBI headquarters with a large bag of fentanyl, seeking the team's protection from the men who shot his father; Nina goes to Scola with a proposal he is hesitant to accept.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The abduction of a young woman leads the team back to a cold case from 18 years ago, which pushes Isobel to reconnect with her old partner Jake and take another shot at solving one of her first cases at the bureau.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Armed with a clear vision and a brazen, 78-page plan, Richard Williams is determined to write his two daughters, Venus and Serena, into history. Training on tennis courts in Compton, Calif., Richard shapes the girls' unyielding commitment and keen intuition. Together, the Williams family defies seemingly insurmountable odds and the prevailing expectations laid before them.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: NASCAR Nation Pre-Race
programme.desc: From North Wilkesboro Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jimmie Johnson, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith set the stage for the Window World 450.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The 2026 Window World 450 of the NASCAR Cup Series gets underway at North Wilkesboro Speedway. This race returns after nearly 30 years and features drivers Ross Chastain, Austin Cindric and Austin Dillon on the 0.625-mile asphalt short track.

programme.title: NASCAR Nation Post Race
programme.desc: From North Wilkesboro Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jimmie Johnson, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith recap the Window World 450.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be bellhops and need to do and say what they're told while assisting unsuspecting guests to their rooms. Then, the guys need to give away tickets to an absurd made-up show they can no longer see.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue undergoes a supernatural sex change to stop a succubus who is slaying men; Piper books the Cranberries to play at her club.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters must turn to a reluctant teenage warlock for help when an evil witch escapes the confines of her 200-year-old prison.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters rally to protect a young man who has cracked an ancient code from a band of warlocks bent on draining the contents of his brain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: At the summer camp where her mother drowned, Prue must follow in her mother's footsteps to protect the returning campers from a watery demon.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters are targeted by a hit woman known as Ms. Hellfire, and Prue goes undercover to find out who hired her, flirting with a cold-blooded criminal.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon sets out to destroy Cupid and all his recent love matches, putting the relationships of the Charmed Ones in danger.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe protects an abandoned baby boy from a vengeful spirit that has methodically killed all the men in the child's family.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue and Phoebe break a code of conduct to cure Piper when she is hospitalized with a deadly disease, but the illness is spread to other patients.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: In light of a new fatality, a cult member's 1978 suicide is re-examined.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A referee's deathbed confession leads to the reopening of a 1976 case in which an over-matched fighter died during a bout.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A murder weapon is found during the city's gun recovery program, prompting detectives to take another look at the accidental 1987 drive-by shooting of a little girl.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly reopens the case of a young woman found murdered in her lover's apartment after the victim's brother gathers more information and finds more than one suspect.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When drawings depicting the murder of a child from 1993 are found next to the victim's grave, the detectives reopen the case, and the child's former caregiver becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: On an island research facility, Dr. Susan McAlester is harvesting the brain tissue of DNA-altered sharks as a possible cure for Alzheimer's disease. When the facility's backers send an executive to investigate the experiments, a routine procedure goes awry and a shark starts attacking the researchers. Now, with sharks outnumbering their human captors, McAlester and her team must figure out a way t

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: Members of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species-thought to be mere myths-rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Kicking good people out and stealing from strangers is what's on the agenda for the Jokers; one of them ruins the entire night of a whole sports bar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are snagging tips and spinning the Wheel of Doom to determine who will be the losing Joker, who will be excusing his bad behavior with a very generous compensation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: From bombing job interviews to trashing their Nona's sauce, the Jokers are not on their game; one Loser is punished by confronting cellphone users.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Busy week for the Jokers as they fake their marriage and interview folks for an upcoming lifestyle article, but one Loser couldn't keep up and will be forced to curse out in tonight's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Reporting crimes and disrupting mealtimes in new challenges, but in the end, one Joker has to shed light onto something or someone important to complete his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are hiding from their boss; they try to get away with sending bizarre emails; one loser won't make it through and is caught red-handed messing with women's purses.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: A thief in a hijacked backhoe; a trucker using Flintstones-style technology; an Amish buggy driver who doesn't care about the rules of the road.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: Twenty stupid performers are in a countdown for a laugh.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers come in hot and correct rude behavior but not before adding an unusual fee to customers' bills; one of them couldn't wrap his mind around winning, so he must wrap his legs around something else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are at Raising Cane's, and following that, asking for help to carry some furniture; one of them will be strapped to a speeding race car for his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The team scouts for the next child star while trying not to laugh as Dan Jost reads his honest movie reviews in a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are breaking and entering a home for a commercial where they showcase their wackiest and over the top performances; to top it off, one loser will be trolling his way through the Liberty Science Center's Touch Tunnel!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Looks like the guys are selling sunsets, while later asking for help to film a bizarre video; one must lose and that one, must help a horse lose something from down under.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: One-star reviews are what Sal, Q, and Murr will be combating, and then testing their acting chops with special celebrity guest, Richard Kind; at the end, one of them will be forced to cut the line at a grocery store, over, and over, and over, and over.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: It's mayhem as the guys work as mall janitors with an out-of-control trash can and then devise a plan of revenge on our producer Dan Cast; in the end, two Jokers lose this episode race and will be getting the refill of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: From being overprotective parents to disclosing perplexing side effects, one Joker can't handle the challenges and will learn that all that glitters is not gold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Q, Murr and Sal throw and catch grocery items in the Joker vs. Joker challenge with special celebrity guest, Jax.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal sit alongside a stranger to participate in a documentary-style interview; they try to upcharge guests again as hotel concierge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers bring their plastic newborns to the grocery store; they pitch new community programs that the local community will find quite strange.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal and Murr air out their dirty laundry by sorting out the whites and colors of their relationship through past clips from the "Couples Therapy Special" with Casey Jost, unlicensed therapist.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: An ex-UFC fighter tries to escape his dark past and penchant for violence by taking a job in a Florida roadhouse.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Nation Pre-Race
programme.desc: From North Wilkesboro Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jimmie Johnson, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith set the stage for the Window World 450.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The 2026 Window World 450 of the NASCAR Cup Series gets underway at North Wilkesboro Speedway. This race returns after nearly 30 years and features drivers Ross Chastain, Austin Cindric and Austin Dillon on the 0.625-mile asphalt short track.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR Nation Post Race
programme.desc: From North Wilkesboro Speedway. Dale Earnhardt Jr., Jimmie Johnson, Jamie McMurray and Marty Smith recap the Window World 450.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr, and Joe help jobseekers land their next big gig; then, they meet with a focus group to pitch their memoirs; the losing joker must deliver the news.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Murr and Q are going on a trip down memory lane and watching extended never-been-seen-before clips from the last few years.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal, Q and Murr kick off another season of antics by getting themselves stuck in a vent system and confusing customers at a bagel shop; our losing Joker will face humiliation in a punishment that's tough to swallow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back working as dry cleaners and TV producers, but one of them can't keep it together and must endure concertgoers who have escaped their enclosures.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers face off by recording voiceover for a fake video game and playing the concerned parent writing to their kid's school; but one Joker burns out with a punishment that's gotta sting.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joey Fatone interviews the Jokers for a fake documentary; the guys react to an overly emotional phone call for an underwhelming reason; one Joker checks out and is forced into being the world's worst grocery store employee in his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers hit the grocery store aisles dressed in absurd disguises, then train someone in using aggressive phone tactics for charity donations; the losing Joker must subject themselves to scientific probing into their hidden emotions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers can't contain the laughs as they answer survey questions for a new snack food and present the world's worst pharmaceutical ads; the loser will work up a sweat in a punishment that's all pain, no gain.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Attention shoppers; the Jokers make mischief by taking unflattering pictures of grocery store patrons, then posing as horrible employees at the Yeti store; tonight's loser must meet his fate in a punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers play unprofessional actors in a fake commercial then make wild assumptions about other mall goers; one Joker breaks and is tasked with becoming the strictest security guard imaginable in his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be medical students in training with standardized patient actors, then play the hero and break up a public fight, hoping to earn applause; one Joker has to put his hips where his mouth is and settle a bet of his own making.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The jokers are asking strangers to send an important text to their loved ones and hunting for their missing kid using crazy descriptions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers hatch horrible revenge schemes on their office bullies, then put one poor contractor through the wringer as they attempt home improvement projects; tonight's loser will be gifted the world's finest douchemobile.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back as wacky inventors pitching a whole new line of AI-themed gadgets; they fill out bogus incident reports with unsuspecting deli customers; the loser will be forced to demonstrate mentally absurd and physically grueling apps.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be bellhops and need to do and say what they're told while assisting unsuspecting guests to their rooms. Then, the guys need to give away tickets to an absurd made-up show they can no longer see.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers' mothers visit as overprotective parents meeting a Joker's girlfriend; a Joker must convince a stranger to pose as his girlfriend for a Broadway outing with his mother.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back playing lawyers, trying to convince unsuspecting focus group participants to sign off on ridiculous terms and conditions before they go in. Then they put their family businesses to the test by asking strangers if their radio ad is good to stay on the air. Later, one joker will be getting revenge in an elaborate punishment that the other two are really going to feel.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are hitting the floor as restaurant owners of a New York Pizzeria, forced to say and do whatever wacky things the other guys tell them to. Later, they're back at Tompkins Square bagels trying to hunt down a customer that left a scathing review. Then, the losing joker is in for a punishment that really sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back at Colonial Diner, offering some new bizarre specials to unsuspecting patrons; they take a ride through the park; after a nasty fall, the Joker must get park goers to help them out from underneath their bike.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are unsympathetic store managers, forced to throw out a disruptive customer before dealing with the wrath and disdain of fellow patrons; thus the guys must get a bystander to take their side during a heated argument with their fake spouses.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose as unreceptive receptionists, then head to a world-famous wax museum; tonight's losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups where they try to sell illogical inventions and clash with shoppers at a shoe store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting children who are being told what to do and say by the other guys; catch and release battle at the supermarket.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose employees at a copy center, then conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers; tonight's big loser becomes the least popular guy at the party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers; the longest punishment in the show's history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash; tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters; with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr go face-to-face at a clothing store; the loser crashes a classy book reading, learning that silence is golden.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q go head-to-head in a focus group; the loser gets hunted down during a walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys take name-calling to new heights and ask for bogus donations; the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint, and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store; the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, then go head-to-head to see who can cling the longest to a stranger's car; the Joker makes a room full of enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park; tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall; a loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store; tonight's big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he's never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics; tonight's loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys spin a wheel and creep out shoppers at the mall; tonight's punishment leaves one Joker soaked, enraged, and totally shocked.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: When Iowa farmer Ray hears a mysterious voice one night in his cornfield saying "If you build it, he will come," he feels the need to act. Despite taunts of lunacy, Ray builds a baseball diamond on his land, supported by his wife, Annie. Afterward, the ghosts of great players start emerging from the crops to play ball, led by "Shoeless" Joe Jackson. But, as Ray learns, this field of dreams is abou
